headline: Amphenol Announces Pricing of Euro-Denominated Senior Notes Offering
summary: WALLINGFORD, Conn., March 24, 2026--Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) (the "Company") announced today the pricing of an offering of €500 million aggregate principal amount of senior notes due 2031 (the "Notes") to be issued by its wholly owned subsidiary Amphenol Technologies Holding GmbH ("Amphenol Technologies"), a German limited liability company (Gesellschaft mit beschränkter Haftung). The Notes will be guaranteed by the Company and will have an interest rate of 3.625% per annum. The closing
